info.title: ReZ Platform API
info.description:
## Overview

Complete API reference for the ReZ platform ecosystem. This combined specification includes all microservice APIs.

### Architecture

The ReZ platform uses a microservices architecture with the following components:

| Service | Port | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| API Gateway | 3001 | Central entry point, routing, rate limiting |
| Auth Service | 4002 | Authentication, user management, MFA |
| Delivery Service | 3005 | Delivery management, driver tracking |
| Analytics Service | 3007 | Real-time analytics, dashboards |
| Payment Links Service | 3008 | UPI payment links, QR codes |
| Journey Service | 3009 | Customer journey automation |
| Automation Service | 4014 | Rule-based automation |
| GDPR Service | 4021 | Consent management, data erasure |
| Validation Service | 3022 | Input validation, sanitization |
| Cohort Service | 4024 | Customer cohort analytics |
| Currency Service | 4026 | Currency conversion, exchange rates |
| Invoice Service | 4028 | GST-compliant invoice generation |
| Menu Service | 4022 | Digital menu management |
| Refund Service | 4030 | Refund processing |
| Tracking Service | 4032 | GPS tracking, ETA calculation |
| Marketing Service | 4000 | Campaign management |

### Authentication

All authenticated endpoints require a Bearer token in the Authorization header:

```
Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>
```

JWT tokens are obtained from the Auth Service.

### Rate Limits

| Endpoint Pattern | Limit | Window |
|-----------------|-------|--------|
| `/api/v1/auth/otp/*` | 3 | 1 minute |
| `/api/v1/auth/login-pin` | 5 | 15 minutes |
| General API | 100 | 1 minute |

### Response Format

All API responses follow this structure:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... },
  "message": "Optional message"
}
```

Error responses:

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Error message",
  "code": "ERROR_CODE"
}
```

### Individual Service Specs

Each service has its own OpenAPI specification:

- [rez-auth-service](./rez-auth-service/openapi.yaml) - Authentication and authorization
- [rez-delivery-service](./rez-delivery-service/openapi.yaml) - Delivery management
- [rez-analytics-service](./rez-analytics-service/openapi.yaml) - Analytics and reporting
- [rez-payment-links-service](./rez-payment-links-service/openapi.yaml) - Payment links
- [rez-journey-service](./rez-journey-service/openapi.yaml) - Journey automation
- [rez-automation-service](./rez-automation-service/openapi.yaml) - Rule automation
- [rez-gdpr-service](./rez-gdpr-service/openapi.yaml) - GDPR compliance
- [rez-validation-service](./rez-validation-service/openapi.yaml) - Input validation
- [rez-cohort-service](./rez-cohort-service/openapi.yaml) - Cohort analytics
- [rez-currency-service](./rez-currency-service/openapi.yaml) - Currency services
- [rez-invoice-service](./rez-invoice-service/openapi.yaml) - Invoice generation
- [rez-menu-service](./rez-menu-service/openapi.yaml) - Menu management
- [rez-refund-service](./rez-refund-service/openapi.yaml) - Refund processing
- [rez-tracking-service](./rez-tracking-service/openapi.yaml) - GPS tracking
- [rez-marketing](./rez-marketing/openapi.yaml) - Marketing campaigns

post.description: Sends an OTP to the specified phone number via SMS or WhatsApp
Verifies the OTP and returns authentication tokens
Authenticates user with phone and PIN
Creates a guest session for web-menu

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all deliveries
Returns aggregated data for the main analytics dashboard
